description: This presentation covers building your first Anchor program, focusing on creating a vesting schedule. It aims to excite developers about building applications on the Solana blockchain, emphasizing the accessibility of programming with Anchor.
topic_summary: The speaker discusses the concept of vesting in finance and technology, explaining how shares are distributed over time and introducing the idea of implementing a vesting schedule using Anchor. The tutorial is designed for those with some experience on Solana, providing a practical introduction to programming with Anchor.
